top_signals.title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bloomberg This Weekend 6/28/2026
top_signals.summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Center for Strategic & International Studies Senior Advisor and Fmr. Vice Foreign Minister of Panama Carlos Ruiz-Hernandez, Fmr. Deputy National Security Advisor Ben Rhodes, Congressional Nominee NY-17 Cait Conley, Fmr. UN Ambassador and Fmr. USAID Ambassador Samantha Power, The Council for Economic Education Senior Advocacy Director Leslie Finnan, Brooklyn Preparatory High School Financial Literacy Educator and Assistant Principal Diana Isern and Boston Globe Social Video Journalist Emily Sweeney. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
